OpenAI's $110B round is the largest private raise in history. Backers: Amazon $50B, SoftBank $30B, Nvidia $30B. Valuation: $840B. For context, that's larger than the market cap of 95% of the S&P 500.

TWEET 3
Anthropic hit $14B annual revenue — ~10x YoY growth — and raised $30B at a $380B valuation. The enterprise AI market isn't emerging anymore. It's scaling at a pace that compresses every competitor's timeline.

xAI raised $20B in a Series E from Nvidia, Cisco, and Saudi Arabia's Humain fund. Sovereign wealth, chip makers, and enterprise infra companies are all betting on the same thesis: AI is the next dominant asset class.

## Fact-check notes
- OpenAI raised $110B (from Amazon $50B, SoftBank $30B, Nvidia $30B) at $840B valuation — largest private funding round in history — MML Studio Feb 2026 recap
- Anthropic raised $30B (GIC, Coatue) at $380B valuation, with revenue at $14B/year representing ~10x year-over-year growth — MML Studio Feb 2026 recap
- xAI raised $20B Series E (Nvidia, Cisco, Saudi Humain contributing $3B) — MML Studio Feb 2026 recap
